name: uychi-ai-hub
description: Uychi AI & IT Hub — Digital investment portal and corporate showcase

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run start:dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w frontend && npm run type-check -w backend
scripts.format: npm run format -w frontend && npm run format -w backend
